records.ety: [Icel, karl a male, a man; akin to AS. ceorl, OHG. charal, G. kerl fellow. See Churl.]

defs: A rude, rustic man; a churl.
quotes: The miller was a stout carl.

defs: Large stalks of hemp which bear the seed; -- called also carl hemp.
A kind of food. See citation, below.
quotes: Caring or carl are gray steeped in water and fried the next day in butter or fat. They are eaten on the second Sunday before Easter, formerly called Carl Sunday.
